sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ مَوَاقِعَ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ يَوْمِيًّا لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi svakodnevno koriste društvene mreže za komunikaciju s prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: Many people use social media sites daily to communicate with friends.

sentences.arabic: يُشَارِكُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُونَ الصُّوَرَ وَالْفِيدْيُوهَاتِ عَنْ حَيَاتِهِمُ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Korisnici dijele fotografije i videozapise o svom svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Users share photos and videos about their daily lives.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا هَذِهِ الْمَوَاقِعُ عَلَى الْبَقَاءِ عَلَى اتِّصَالٍ مَعَ النَّاسِ الْبَعِيدِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ove stranice nam pomažu da ostanemo u kontaktu s ljudima koji su daleko.
sentences.translationEn: These sites help us stay in touch with people far away.

sentences.arabic: وَلَكِنْ يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا اسْتِخْدَامُهَا بِحِكْمَةٍ وَعَدَمُ إِضَاعَةِ الْوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Ali moramo ih koristiti mudro i ne gubiti vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: But we must use them wisely and not waste time.
